title: xyris calderonii
intro: Xyris calderonii, also known as the Calderón's xyris or Xyris calderonii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of central and southern Mexico, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and has been found to have antioxidant and antihistamine properties, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. The xyris calderonii plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies in Mexico.
